Harvard University

Search for courses by course name, department, instructor, or keyword. Or browse by department for a listing of courses by term.
Evaluations prior to Fall 2019 are no longer available to students. For faculty or administrators seeking evaluations prior to Fall 2019, please contact the appropriate divisional associate dean: Arts and Humanities -Kendra Barber ( kendrahbarber@fas.harvard.edu ); Social Science- Kimberly O’Hagan ( kohagan@fas.harvard.edu ); Science -Laura Wipf ( laura_wipf @fas.harvard.edu ); SEAS- Diane L. Schneeberger (dls@seas.harvard.edu )
